name: github_download_job_logs_for_workflow_run
description: Get a temporary download URL for a workflow job's plain-text logs (GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/jobs/{job_id}/logs). GitHub responds with HTTP 302 and a Location URL; this tool returns that URL without downloading. The URL expires after 1 minute. Anyone with read access can use this; classic tokens need repo scope for private repositories. See GitHub REST workflow jobs.
